# Review Lane Template

## Format Lane

Check:
- heading hierarchy
- chapter-start cleanliness
- paragraph spacing
- italics and glyph survival
- front-matter presence

## Device Lane

Check:
- Kindle Previewer or other Kindle-facing behavior
- second-opinion EPUB reader
- print proof readability

## Copy Lane

Check:
- typos
- repeated phrasing
- duplicate or skipped chapter labels
- leftover notes or meta leakage

## Reader Lane

Report:
- what grabbed attention fast
- where attention drifted
- what felt generic
- what felt emotionally true
- what payoff landed
- what payoff needed better setup
